title: Admin Mobile Preview Session Request
description: Mint a one-time mobile-preview code for the CURRENT admin. Intentionally has NO instance_id/user id: the backend derives + verifies the admin server-side from the JWT. The optional scope (keyword/page/language/draft) is bound into the code and enforced on exchange. additionalProperties:false rejects any unknown field.

page_id.description: Page id to preview (alternative to keyword).

language_id.description: Language id to render the preview in.

draft.description: Whether to preview the unpublished draft version.
